meta.notes: Read-only research log. No trades are ever placed by this routine.

catalyst.name: Phase 3 REGAL trial (Galinpepimut-S, AML) - event-driven unblind
catalyst.status: 78 of 80 required events reported as of company's May 11, 2026 update; final analysis triggers on 80th event; topline readout guided for 2H 2026
catalyst.next_check: watch for 8-K / press release announcing 80th event

positions.risk_flag: OVER_CONCENTRATED - 69.8% of NAV vs 35% trim threshold

catalyst.name: $25B investment-grade bond deal (priced late Jun/early Jul 2026, $89B demand, proceeds retired bridge loan) + staggered IPO lockup
catalyst.status: First lockup tranche (20% of 180-day block) unlocks 2nd full trading day after Q2 2026 earnings, expected late Jul/early Aug 2026; further 7% tranches Aug-Oct; full lockup expires Dec 8 2026
catalyst.next_check: Q2 2026 earnings date announcement; stock reaction into lockup

positions.risk_flag: WATCH - within cap but second-largest single-name risk; lockup supply event ~2-3 weeks out

flags: SLS at 69.8% of NAV is nearly double the 35% single-name trim threshold, in a pre-binary-catalyst biotech with no news that breaks the thesis but no catalyst confirmation either.
Zero USD cash buffer - account fully invested, no dry powder to add on weakness (not on margin, so no forced-liquidation risk).
SPCX facing its first staggered lockup unlock in ~2-3 weeks; stock already down 4-5% pre-market with no negative credit news (bond was oversubscribed, investment-grade).

catalyst.name: Phase 3 REGAL trial (Galinpepimut-S, AML) - event-driven unblind
catalyst.status: Still 78 of 80 required events as of May 11, 2026 update; no confirmation of 80th event reached; CEO Fox & Friends appearance (week of Jul 20) fueled retail speculation of imminent news but company has NOT confirmed any data release; stock made new July lows (~$11.84 intraday Jul 22) into the wait
catalyst.next_check: watch for 8-K / press release announcing 80th event and database lock

positions.risk_flag: OVER_CONCENTRATED - 73.91% of NAV vs 35% trim threshold (worse than 69.8% on 7/11); trim ~36.33 sh to reach 35% cap

catalyst.name: First-ever public Q2 2026 earnings (Aug 4, after close) + first staggered IPO lockup unlock
catalyst.status: Earnings date confirmed Aug 4 2026; initial 20% lockup tranche unlocks 2nd full trading day after earnings = Aug 6 2026 (up to 911.5M sh eligible); further 7% tranches at 90/105/120/135 days; full lockup expires Dec 8 2026; Musk's 6.4B sh locked to Jun 2027; $25B IG bond deal already priced/closed ($89B demand, proceeds retired bridge loan - credit-positive, not a red flag); stock now trading at its 52-week low ($115.19)
catalyst.next_check: Aug 4 earnings print; Aug 6 lockup unlock trading reaction

positions.risk_flag: WATCH - within 35% cap (down from 30.08%) but down 20.27% since last run and sitting at 52-wk low heading into stacked earnings+lockup catalysts ~2 weeks out

flags: SLS concentration worsened to 73.91% of NAV (from 69.8% on 7/11) - more than double the 35% trim threshold, with zero fresh catalyst confirmation despite retail speculation.
SPCX down 20.27% since last run and now testing its 52-week low, heading into a confirmed back-to-back binary window: Q2 earnings Aug 4 + first lockup unlock Aug 6.
Zero USD cash buffer persists across both runs - no dry powder for either event (not on margin, so no forced-liquidation risk).
Total account NAV down 10.44% since 7/11 ($1,261.21 -> $1,129.57 USD), driven mostly by the SPCX decline.
